channel.title: UniFi on DevOpsTales
channel.description: Recent content in UniFi on DevOpsTales

item.title: How to Configure Windows RADIUS and UniFi Controller
item.description: Implementing 802.1X wireless authentication with Windows NPS (Network Policy Server) and UniFi access points provides enterprise-grade security for your wireless network. This updated guide for 2026 covers Windows Server 2022/2025 and the latest UniFi Controller.

item.title: How to setup Unifi Controller on Debian 10
item.description: In this post I will show you how to install Unifi Controller on Debian 10 Buster.

item.title: Pfsese USG S2S VPN
item.description: I will show you how to create a site-to-site VPN for pfSense and unifi usg.
